input:
Abū Sufyān stayed with al-ʿAbbās that night. At dawn, when the Muslim soldiers started making ablutions in preparation for their prayers, Abū Sufyān shivered with fear. He asked al-ʿAbbās what they were doing. Al-ʿAbbās explained that they were preparing for prayers. When they prayed, led by the Prophet, Abū Sufyān watched in amazement as he saw all the Muslims bowing in prayers when the Prophet bowed, and prostrating themselves when he prostrated himself. He said to his interlocuter: “Al-ʿAbbās, they are always doing his bidding?” Al-ʿAbbās answered: “Yes, indeed.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 34: A Long Conflict Draws to a Close

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 34

characters.name: Abu Sufyan ibn Harb
characters.appearance: Middle-aged, medium build, confident posture. Wearing a light brown woolen cloak, white turban with a small dark blue cloth wrapped around it. Black leather sandals. Strong facial features, sharp eyes, slight scowl.

characters.name: Al-Abbas ibn Abd al-Muttalib
characters.appearance: Early 40s, light-skinned, robust build, tall. Thick black beard, neatly kept. Wearing a white cotton thobe, dark brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, warm smile.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

output.moral_lesson: Loyalty and obedience to Allah's commands can be a powerful witness to the truth.
output.narrative_text: Abu Sufyan watched in amazement as the Muslims prayed, led by the Prophet. He saw them bowing and prostrating themselves just like the Prophet, and asked al-ʿAbbās if they were always doing his bidding.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by morning sunlight. Abu Sufyan and al-ʿAbbās shown with full faces. No graphic violence or fear-inspiring scenes.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Early morning scene in a 7th century Makkah mud-brick courtyard. A group of Muslim men, including a tall robust man with a black beard and a white turban, and a middle-aged man with a light brown cloak and a scowl, standing around a central figure in a white thobe and green cloak, seen entirely from behind, leading the group in prayer. Morning sunlight casting warm shadows on the ground. Distant mud-brick buildings, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.

metadata.chapter_title: A Long Conflict Draws to a Close
